column1: Loose comparison of a hash or secret (type juggling)
column2: Comparing a hash/secret with `==`/`!=` (instead of `===`/`hash_equals`) is subject to PHP type juggling (`"0e123" == "0e456"` is true), enabling authentication bypass.
column4: Loose comparison ('==') of a hash/secret is subject to type juggling; use '===' or hash_equals().
